/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/ruby/lib -Wl,-u,_QDarwinMicrophonePermissionRequest -Xlinker -no_warn_duplicate_libraries CMakeFiles/whisper_client.dir/whisper_client_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whisper_client.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whisper_client.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whisper_client.dir/audiocapture.mm.o CMakeFiles/whisper_client.dir/asrclient.cpp.o "/opt/homebrew/share/qt/plugins/permissions/objects-Release/QDarwinMicrophonePermissionPlugin_init/QDarwinMicrophonePermissionPlugin_init.cpp.o" -o whisper_client -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtMultimedia.framework/Versions/A/QtMultimedia /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWebSockets.framework/Versions/A/QtWebSockets -framework AudioToolbox /opt/homebrew/share/qt/plugins/permissions/libqdarwinmicrophonepermission.a /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers -framework Foundation -framework AVFoundation
